Latest SEC Filings API

Stay updated with the most recent SEC filings from publicly traded companies.

About Latest SEC Filings API

Retrieve recent 8-K, 10-K, and 10-Q filings with date filters and pagination.

Example Use Case

An analyst can fetch the latest filings between two dates for compliance review.

Endpoint:

https://financialmodelingprep.com/stable/sec-filings-financials?from=2024-01-01&to=2024-03-01&page=0&limit=100

Latest SEC Filings API Parameters

Name Type Description
from string Start date.
to string End date.
page integer Page number.
limit integer Maximum number of results. 
{"data": [{"formType": "8-K", "date": "2024-02-03"}]}
